allow: PowerShell(cd "E:\\Mood-Detection-Classification-Project"; $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $y="https://github.com/opencv/opencv_zoo/raw/main/models/face_detection_yunet/face_detection_yunet_2023mar.onnx"; $f="https://github.com/onnx/models/raw/main/validated/vision/body_analysis/emotion_ferplus/model/emotion-ferplus-8.onnx"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $y -OutFile "models\\face_detection_yunet.onnx"; "YuNet OK: " + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item models\\face_detection_yunet.onnx\).Length/1KB,1\) + " KB" } catch { "YuNet FAILED: $_" }; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $f -OutFile "models\\emotion-ferplus-8.onnx"; "FER+ OK: " + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item models\\emotion-ferplus-8.onnx\).Length/1MB,2\) + " MB" } catch { "FER+ FAILED: $_" })
